generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former civil defense planner, I've seen firsthand how overinvestment in preparedness programs actually weakens our national security. These programs divert critical resources from our military while creating a false sense of security among citizens. We need to focus on real threats, not expensive feel-good measures. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
